description: jf Jcrankr VOLUME II 31 ratcehln Jfamilir Detospaptr Jnkprnknt on all Subjects GREENVILLE BOND COUNTY ILLINOIS JANUARY 26 I860 publisher proprietor NUMBER 51 PRINCIPLES OP THE REPUBLI CAN PARTY Komarlcs of Honorable Lyman Trumbull of I lliuois IN TUT SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES THURSDAY DEC 8 1839 Mr President just before the ad journment of this body yesterday I was called upon by the Senator from Florida Mr Yulee to state what were the principles of the Republican party He said he desired a precise statement of the point Ami if it is emblazoned to the world and i so simple that all who run may read it certainly can occupy hut very little of the time of the Senate to state explicitly and in a few words what the position of the party is and to what point it tends what is the purpose of their organization and what is the policy Jlhey propose to establish in this country upon the slavery question Sir I did suppose that the Senator from Florida and every Senator could understand if he desired to do so what our principles were They have been proclaimed by an nuthorative convention of the party
